summary: Fixed 7 compilation errors by adding @Builder annotations to DTO classes in root code/ directory. All DTO classes now have the required Lombok @Builder annotation to support builder pattern usage in service implementations and test classes.
next_steps: Run Maven build to verify compilation success. If build still fails, consider removing duplicate files from root code/ directory as proper package structure already exists.
